email_subject: Application for Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek at Page Personnel Belgium. With a background in logistics (Katoen Natie) and strong organizational and communication skills, I am eager to develop a career in supply chain operations.

In my previous logistics role, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment. I am detail-oriented, analytical, and fluent in English and Dutch (A2, currently studying). I am quick to learn new systems and thrive in hands-on, team-oriented settings.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills align with this traineeship. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Traineeship Customer Operations Logistiek at Page Personnel Belgium. Having recently worked in logistics at Katoen Natie, I have firsthand experience in a fast-paced, high-volume warehouse environment where accuracy and efficiency were paramount. This role sparked my interest in supply chain operations, and I am eager to build on that foundation through this traineeship.

During my time at Katoen Natie, I developed a strong sense of responsibility and attention to detail—skills essential for coordinating inbound and outbound flows, managing transport documents, and handling customer inquiries. I am comfortable communicating in both Dutch (A2, currently taking classes) and English (professional), and I am confident in my ability to interact with clients and internal teams effectively.

Beyond logistics, my experience as a Junior Digital Marketer has honed my analytical and problem-solving abilities. I regularly track performance data, identify issues, and implement improvements—a mindset I can apply to optimizing logistics processes and resolving claims. I am also highly organized, having managed multiple client websites and content calendars simultaneously.

I am particularly drawn to this traineeship because of the structured learning and coaching it offers. I am a proactive, hands-on learner who thrives in a dynamic environment. The opportunity to work in the Gentse haven with a global logistics leader is exactly the challenge I am looking for.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my background and enthusiasm can contribute to your team. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025–2026) – maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment
Strong organizational and analytical skills from digital marketing and web projects
Fluent in English (professional) and Dutch (A2, in progress) – ready to communicate with clients and teams
Proactive, hands-on learner with a problem-solving mindset
Detail-oriented and comfortable with data tracking and reporting
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on logistics experience at Katoen Natie and strong organizational, analytical, and communication skills. Eager to build a career in supply chain operations through a structured traineeship. Detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in fast-paced environments. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Logistics & operations: warehouse operations, accuracy, efficiency, fast-paced environment
- Communication & coordination: client communication, internal coordination, multilingual (English professional, Dutch A2)
- Analytical & problem-solving: data tracking, performance analysis, identifying improvements
- Organization & planning: managing multiple tasks, attention to detail, time management
- Digital tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, WordPress, Elementor
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
